---
title: "第10章"
---

# 第10章 自相关

<img src="img/teacher.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[讲义](https://lizongzhang.github.io/emetrics26/chap10slide.html){target="_blank"}


# Eviews操作

<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Eviews 自相关的图形诊断](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1nV41117rt/){target="_blank"} 
    
<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Eviews 自相关LM检验](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1dy4y1z7KQ/){target="_blank"}     
    
<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Eviews 广义差分变换](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Ji4y1L7GJ/){target="_blank"}     
    
<img src="img/video.png" alt="讲义" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Eviews 自相关下标准误的Neway-West校正](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1FT4y1c7ve/){target="_blank"}    

# R教学视频

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[回归模型的比较------受限模型的F检验](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1tg411a7ut){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[自相关的图形诊断]<to be updated>

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Durbin-Watson检验在R的实现]<to be updated>

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[一阶差分在R的实现]<to be updated>

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[广义差分在R的实现\]<to be updated>

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[Newey-West校正后的标准误]<to be updated>


# 习题讲评视频

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[教材习题10.10](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1ey4y1W75g){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[教材习题10.12](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1ey4y1W75g){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[教材习题10.13](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1ey4y1W75g){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[教材习题10.17](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1ey4y1W75g){target="_blank"}

<img src="img/video.png" style="width: 24px; height: 24px;margin-right: 10px">[教材习题10.21](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1ey4y1W75g){target="_blank"}
